entity.summary: Polish centralized cryptocurrency exchange that abruptly ceased operations in July 2019, citing loss of liquidity and inability to continue service.
entity.notes: Death date follows the public exchange notice and database references stating that operations ceased effective 2019-07-08 due to loss of liquidity.

events.title: BitMarket launched
events.description: BitMarket operated as one of the older Polish cryptocurrency exchanges, commonly described as founded in 2014.
events.notes: Year-level launch date based on public reporting and database references.

events.title: Operations ceased after loss of liquidity
events.description: BitMarket abruptly ceased operations effective 2019-07-08, citing loss of liquidity and leaving users unable to continue normal platform activity.
events.notes: Used as death_date because the public notice stated that the service was forced to cease operations on this date.

evidence.title: BitMarket trade volume and market listings
evidence.notes: Used for exchange profile, untracked market status, and ceased-operation context.

evidence.title: Polish Crypto Exchange Bitmarket Suddenly Shuts Down
evidence.notes: Used for sudden shutdown and loss-of-liquidity context.

evidence.title: Bitmarket.pl konczy dzialalnosc. Klienci maja problem
evidence.notes: Polish business-media report quoting the closure notice and loss-of-liquidity reason.

evidence.title: BitMarket ceased operation listing
evidence.notes: Database reference states BitMarket reportedly ceased operation effective 2019-07-08 due to loss of liquidity.
